title: Collection
description: A NYPL Digital Collections collection — a curated grouping of digitized items, from NYPL's own public Digital Collections API (api.repo.nypl.org/api/v2/collections and collections/{uuid}). Keyed on UUID. A DigitalItem belongs to one or more Collections.

itemCount.description: Number of digitized items in the collection.

parentUuid.description: Parent collection UUID, for nested collections.

collectionLink.description: Public digitalcollections.nypl.org page for the collection.
